calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2026 Off Calendar
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-29-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by Victoria Sanchez CSR 13447 #559-308-2237 Sanchez_victoria@rocketmail.com

Plaintiff Macy Architecture appearing represented by Liam Malone, Esq. and Mary Tiernan, Esq.
Defendants Richard Hannunm and Forge Development Partners LLC not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

Court examines witness for Plaintiff MARK MACY and he confirms statements made by counsel.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Macy Architecture, and against Defendants Richard Hannunm and Forge Development Partners LLC, as follows:

Damages: $184,500.00
Prejudgment Interest: $42,090.65
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $1,367.52

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $227,958.17

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To Jul-15-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
